name: Paychex
description: Monitor Paychex payroll platform for employee data access and HR compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Sign up at https://developer.paychex.com
2. Go to My Apps and create an App
3. Copy Client ID and Client Secret
4. Enter both values below

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: From Paychex Developer Portal - My Apps

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: From Paychex Developer Portal - My Apps

checks.name: Employee Access

checks.name: App Availability
